name: council
description: LLM Council - get answers from multiple Claude models, have them evaluate each other anonymously, and synthesize the best response

interface.shortDescription: Run baseline, dynamic, and role-based LLM council workflows.
interface.longDescription: Council bundles three skill variants for multi-model deliberation: a fast baseline council, an adaptive dynamic council, and a role-based council that emphasizes perspective diversity before synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Convene the baseline council for this question.
Use the dynamic council for a high-stakes decision.
Run the role-based council on this prompt.
